title: Jai Jai Swami Samarth
desc: Swami Samarth Appeared In The Kardali Forests. He Traveled All Across The Indian Subcontinent And Eventually Set His Abode At Akkalkot To Meet His Devotee Cholappa. Where He Accidently Met Chanda.

title: Mohini - Premachi Filmy Kahaani
desc: It's hate at first sight for superstar RK and fiery 'lady hero' Mohini, but destiny forces their paths to collide, unfolding a dramatic tale of passion, betrayal and unexpected love.
